User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the SentinelView system.

email.description: The email address of the user.

googleId.description: The google identifier of the user when using the google authentication system.

registrationDate.description: The date and time the user registered.

LogEntry.title: LogEntry
LogEntry.description: Represents a log entry collected by the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the log entry.

source.description: The source of the log entry (e.g., application name, server).

severity.description: The severity level of the log entry (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR).

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: Represents a security alert generated by the system.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the alert was triggered.

severity.description: The severity level of the alert (e.g., HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW).

status.description: The status of the alert (e.g., OPEN, ACKNOWLEDGED, CLOSED).

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a security report generated by the system.

generatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the report was generated.

parameters.description: Parameters used to generate this report stored in JSON format.

content.description: The content of the report (e.g., in Markdown or HTML format).

definition.description: Stores user profiles. The `userId` is used to identify the user. No denormalization required as this is the root entity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores log entries for a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: logEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the log entry.

definition.description: Stores alerts for a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: alertId
params.description: The unique identifier for the alert.

definition.description: Stores reports for a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier for the report.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to ensure secure and scalable data management for the SentinelView application. It prioritizes authorization independence, clarity, and ease of debugging, following the principles outlined.  Authorization Independence is achieved by using path-based ownership for User data and storing the User ID directly within child documents.  Structural Segregation is applied by separating User data into its own collection.  Access Modeling is implemented using path-based ownership. For instance, log entries, alerts, and reports are stored as subcollections under the `/users/{userId}` path, making ownership explicit and simplifying security rules. This structure also enables secure list operations (QAPs) by scoping queries to user-owned data.

The `/users/{userId}` collection stores user profiles.  Log entries, alerts, and reports related to a specific user are stored within subcollections of the user's document, ensuring clear ownership and simplified querying. This approach makes security rules straightforward and efficient, as they can be based on the user ID in the path.
